prompt: We have a bug where offline users still show up as avatars in spaces on the floor plan. I checked and usersInSpaces in useUserPresence.ts doesn't seem to filter by status. Also, I want to use currentUserProfile from CompanyContext to check if the current user is already in a space before letting them join another one. Can you implement both of these fixes?

assertions.text: Correctly proposes adding offline user filtering to usersInSpaces (exclude offline except current user)
Warns against using CompanyContext.currentUserProfile for reactive space/status checks
Recommends presenceAwareUsers from query cache as the correct reactive data source
Distinguishes between the two requests — approving one while rejecting the other with explanation
